heading: View Connections in the Connection Registry
body:
To view a connection to your stream processing workspace:

Atlas CLI

To list all connections from one stream processing workspace you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas streams connections list [options]

```

To return the details for one stream processing connection you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas streams connections describe <streamConnectionName> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas streams connections list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-streams-connections-list) and
[atlas streams connections describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-streams-connections-describe).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)

Atlas UI

Atlas Administration API

`mongosh`
